languages.text: {n}Молчание. Пустой взгляд. Наконец, ответ:{/n} "Новых знаний, инструментов, опыта — их не хватало. Мое пребывание на Амсанкте не исправило бы ситуацию. Я решил сбежать в Простор и искать ответы там. Я не мог взять Нунциуса с собой, поэтому я тайно перенаправил Движущую Силу из основного генератора на поддержку стазис-сацеллума, оставив питание основного лагеря на резервном, после чего законсервировал нашу лабораторию".

{n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

languages.text: {n}Silencio. Una mirada vacía. y por fin, una respuesta:{/n} «Nuevos conocimientos, herramientas, experiencia... necesitaba más. Quedándome en Amsanct no arreglaría el problema. Decidí escapar a la Extensión y buscar aquí las respuestas. No podía traer conmigo a Nuncius, así que desvié en secreto la Fuerza Motriz del generador principal para que alimentara el sacelio de suspensión, dejando que el campamento principal funcionara con energía de reserva, y cerré el laboratorio».
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Silencio. Una mirada vacía. y por fin, una respuesta:{/n} «Nuevos conocimientos, herramientas, experiencia... necesitaba más. Quedándome en Amsanct no arreglaría el problema. Decidí escapar a la Extensión y buscar aquí las respuestas. No podía traer conmigo a Nuncius, así que desvié en secreto la Fuerza Motriz del generador principal para que alimentara el sacelio de suspensión, dejando que el campamento principal funcionara con energía de reserva, y cerré el laboratorio».

languages.text: {n}沉默凝滞在空气中。他目光空洞。终于，他开口道：{/n}“我需要新的知识、新的工具，以及新的经验。留在阿姆桑克特无济于事。我决定逃去扩区寻找答案。我不能带努恩修斯一起走，所以只能暗中将主源力切给静滞神龛，让主营地用备用能源，随后封死了实验室。”
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

traits.locale_text: {n}沉默凝滞在空气中。他目光空洞。终于，他开口道：{/n}“我需要新的知识、新的工具，以及新的经验。留在阿姆桑克特无济于事。我决定逃去扩区寻找答案。我不能带努恩修斯一起走，所以只能暗中将主源力切给静滞神龛，让主营地用备用能源，随后封死了实验室。”

languages.text: {n}Il observe quelques instants en silence, le regard vide, avant de répondre :{/n} « De nouvelles connaissances, de nouveaux outils, de l'expérience... Il m'en fallait plus que ce qui était à ma disposition sur Amsanct. Je n'aurais rien pu arranger en restant là-bas, aussi ai-je décidé de me rendre dans les Étendues afin d'y chercher des réponses. Comme je ne pouvais pas emmener Nuncius, j'ai secrètement détourné la Force Motrice du générateur principal pour alimenter le sacellum de stase, en reliant le camp à une source d'énergie auxiliaire, puis j'ai fermé notre laboratoire. »
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

Il m'en fallait plus que ce qui était à ma disposition sur Amsanct. Je n'aurais rien pu arranger en restant là-bas, aussi ai-je décidé de me rendre dans les Étendues afin d'y chercher des réponses. Comme je ne pouvais pas emmener Nuncius, j'ai secrètement détourné la Force Motrice du générateur principal pour alimenter le sacellum de stase, en reliant le camp à une source d'énergie auxiliaire, puis j'ai fermé notre laboratoire. »

languages.text: {n}Sessizlik. Boş bir bakış. Sonunda cevabını alıyorsun.{/n} "Yeni bilgiler, aletler, deneyim... Daha fazlasına ihtiyacım vardı. Amsanct'ta kalmam durumu düzeltmeyecekti. Enginlik'e kaçmaya ve cevapları orada aramaya karar verdim. Nuncius'u yanımda götüremezdim. Staz şapelini desteklemek için Devinim Gücü'nü gizlice ana jeneratörden yönlendirdim, ana kampı yedek güce aldım ve laboratuvarımızı kapattım."
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

Enginlik'e kaçmaya ve cevapları orada aramaya karar verdim. Nuncius'u yanımda götüremezdim. Staz şapelini desteklemek için Devinim Gücü'nü gizlice ana jeneratörden yönlendirdim, ana kampı yedek güce aldım ve laboratuvarımızı kapattım."

languages.text: {n}Schweigen. Ein leerer Blick. Und schließlich eine Antwort:{/n} "Neues Wissen, Werkzeuge, Erfahrung ... ich brauchte mehr. Auf Amsanct konnte ich an der Situation nichts ändern. Ich beschloss, in die Ausdehnung zu fliehen, um dort nach Antworten zu suchen. Da ich Nuncius nicht mitnehmen konnte, habe ich die Antriebskraft des Hauptgenerators heimlich auf das Stascen-Sacellum umgeleitet, das Hauptlager auf Notstrom geschaltet und unser Labor verriegelt."
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."

Ich beschloss, in die Ausdehnung zu fliehen, um dort nach Antworten zu suchen. Da ich Nuncius nicht mitnehmen konnte, habe ich die Antriebskraft des Hauptgenerators heimlich auf das Stascen-Sacellum umgeleitet, das Hauptlager auf Notstrom geschaltet und unser Labor verriegelt."

languages.text: {n}静寂。虚ろなまなざし。ようやく返事が返ってきた：{/n}「新しい知識、道具、経験......私にはもっと必要だった。アムサンクトに留まっていても、状況は解決しない。私はエクスパンスに逃げ、そこで答えを探すことにした。ヌンキウスを連れて行くわけにはいかなかったから、密かにメイン・ジェネレーターの動力をステイシス・サセラムのサポートに転用し、メイン・キャンプを予備電源にした。」
languages.original_text: {n}Silence. An empty gaze. Finally, a reply:{/n} "New knowledge, tools, experience — I needed more. My staying on Amsanct would not fix the situation. I decided to flee to the Expanse and seek answers there. I couldn't take Nuncius with me, so I secretly diverted the Motive Force from the main generator to support the stasis sacellum, placing the main camp on reserve power, then closed up our laboratory."
